name: Tyler Technologies Odyssey Court Management API
what_it_does: Tyler Technologies Odyssey REST API for court case management and justice information platform. Enables AI agents to access court case records and docket information, retrieve case filing and hearing schedules, manage eFiling integrations, access judicial and court party data, retrieve bond and financial transaction records, integrate with public safety systems, access document and evidence management, handle court notification workflows, and connect court data with public-facing legal information systems.
use_cases: Retrieving court case records and docket data from legal research agents
Managing eFiling submissions from court document automation agents
Accessing hearing schedules and case timelines from legal workflow agents
Integrating court data with public safety systems from justice interoperability agents
not_for: Private legal practice management without court system integration
Non-government case management without public court record requirements
Commercial dispute resolution without government court workflows
best_when: A court system, county government, or legal technology firm integrating with Tyler Odyssey courts wants AI agents to automate case monitoring, docket management, eFiling, and court data interoperability.
avoid_when: PRIVACY+LEGAL: Court case records may include sealed, expunged, or juvenile records that are legally protected from disclosure. Criminal history data has heightened privacy requirements. Case automation must comply with court rules and local administrative orders.

auth.notes: Tyler Odyssey uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Court-level and jurisdiction-specific credentials. Tyler Developer Portal provides API access. Integration Hub for connecting court systems. Scopes control case, financial, document, and public record access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — government court enterprise licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-court and per-jurisdiction enterprise pricing; government pricing structures
pricing.notes: Plano, Texas. NYSE: TYL. Founded 1966 as Universal Computing. Largest provider of integrated software for the public sector in the US. Odyssey used in 700+ courts. Tyler acquired New World Systems, ExecuTime, CivicHR. Dominant in US public sector tech.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; government SLA-based

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY+LEGAL: Sealed, expunged, and juvenile records are legally protected — access restrictions mandatory
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key via Tyler Developer Portal
CJIS compliance required for criminal justice data access — background check requirements
Court-specific configuration — each jurisdiction has different case type and workflow configurations
eFiling automation must comply with court-specific local rules and administrative orders
Criminal record data has state-specific expungement and restriction rules
agent_readiness.security_notes: Court case and criminal justice data. FedRAMP, CJIS, SOC2, StateRamp. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. Sealed/juvenile records legally protected. CJIS compliance for criminal data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Court and criminal justice data. FedRAMP, CJIS, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. Legally protected record categories. CJIS compliance.
